verdict: A highly energetic and incredibly well-synced chart that captures the disco-house rhythm perfectly, with only minor recovery flow issues after jumps.

issues.problem: Landing the UR jump forces an awkward double-step or uncomfortable weight shifting to hit the subsequent D and U taps.
Repeats the same awkward flow issue where a UR jump is immediately followed by a vertical D -> U sequence.
A slight 16th-note off-beat tap feels rhythmically disjointed compared to the clean quarter/eighth-note structure elsewhere.
